figures.caption: Figure 1: The Sierpinski gasket, which serves as a prototype throughout the paper.
Figure 2: The isomorphism between measure spaces (K, ν) and (Q,λ) induces a corresponding isomorphism between the function spaces L1(K, ν) and L1(Q,λ).

Figure 3: a. The heat map of the function f(x) = e−|x1−x2| on SG G ⊂ R2 (above) and it is representation as a function on [0, 1] (below). b. Graphon representation of W (x, y) = e−∥x−y∥, (x, y) ∈ G×G ⊂ R2 ×R2.
